title: Rabbit to Bunny
description: Replaces all uses of the word "Rabbit" with "Bunny" in all English variants.
body:
A very simple resource pack that replaces all instances of the word "Rabbit" with "Bunny". I created this because the word "Rabbit" puts me off as someone who loves bunnies very very much.

Includes:
- "Rabbit" entity name
- All "Rabbit" drops
- "Rabbit Stew"
- "Rabbit Spawn Egg"
- "Light as a Rabbit" advancement
- All "Rabbit" subtitles

Supported Languages:
- English (US)
- English (United Kingdom)
- English (Canada)
- English (Australia)
- English (New Zealand)
- ɥsᴉꞁᵷuƎ (uʍoᗡ ǝpᴉsd∩)
- Pirate Speak (The Seven Seas) (replacing "Hare")
- Shakespearean English (Kingdom of England) (replacing "Hare")
- LOLCAT (Kingdom of Cats) (replacing "Wabit")

Does NOT include:
- Mods or datapacks that also have "Rabbit" in the names of things.
- "Jumpin Foodz" in LOLCAT
- Anglish (Oned Riches)
